items.name: DSP World Leaders
items.notes: Targeted executive conversations at DSP World Leaders. Pre-Navigate C-suite relationship-building. No product disclosure - ICF and orchestration narrative only.

items.name: Fierce Network Landscape Webinar
items.notes: Co-produced with Fierce Network on AI-powered communications applications.

items.name: Disruptive Analysis Landscape White Paper
items.notes: ‘AI Voice for CSPs: The Hidden SMB Opportunity.’ Creates the backdrop for the larger announcement.

items.name: Launch blog for DA white paper
items.notes: Short blog introducing Dean’s white paper. Byline TBD.

items.name: Tee-up DA white paper EDM
items.notes: Email blast to the full contact list announcing the white paper. First major outbound send of Phase 1.

items.name: LinkedIn Content Strategy - Landscape / Hype
items.notes: Cadence, copy and post formats for landscape messaging ahead of launch.

items.name: Messaging House - ICF GW, Orch, APIs + Thread
items.notes: Single source of truth for all outbound messaging. Must be approved before any external content is published.

items.name: ICF GW, Orch, APIs + Thread imagery suite
items.notes: Visual identity suite - works across web, social, print and booth. Issued to agency early enough to inform sizzle video brief.

items.name: Landscape blog #1 - ‘Revenue Streams Are Unraveling’
items.notes: Article 1 of 2. Problem framing: CSPs are being bypassed as AI reshapes voice. Sets up the ‘missing layer’ narrative.

items.name: Hype campaign - ‘The Pattern Is Changing: Sep 9, 2026’
items.notes: Web banner and Navigate promo material. Plays on fabric / clothing / web deployment patterns.

items.name: Acquire threadnetwork.io, host on HubSpot
items.notes: Foundational element for Thread microsite.

items.name: Standup threadnetwork.io infra on HubSpot
items.notes: Create landing page infra.

items.name: Tee-up DA webinar EDMs 1 and 2 to full contact list
items.notes: Promoted via EDM sequence.

items.name: Internal sales webinar with Dean: AI Voice SMB Market Opportunity
items.notes: Dean gives an interactive introduction to his white paper and takes questions from the sales team. Helps us tune the public webinar a couple of weeks later.

items.name: Internal sales webinar with Dag: The Power of Orchestration
items.notes: Dag showcasing how orchestration connects infrastructure, automation and AI-enabled services to help CSPs modernize, monetize and move faster.

items.name: Disruptive Analysis Landscape Webinar
items.notes: Public webinar with Disruptive Analysis on ‘AI Voice for CSPs: The Hidden SME Opportunity.’ Companion to the white paper, promoted via EDM sequence.

items.name: Determine ABM targets (placeholder - bigger if yes)
items.notes: Evaluate whether ABM content is needed to support reference customers and early design partners.

items.name: Determine vertical targets (bigger project if yes)
items.notes: Dentists? HVAC Repair? Mom/Pop retail? Push content out or defer to EP?

items.name: Landscape blog #2 - ‘Revenue Streams Are Unraveling’
items.notes: The missing layer: why orchestration is the gap between AI promise and operator reality. Bridges to launch.

items.name: Internal sales webinar with Nic: Embracing AI Experience Providers
items.notes: Nic exploring how CSPs can embrace AI Experience Providers as a new route to revenue, differentiation and customer engagement.

items.name: Navigate booth messaging
items.notes: Banner messaging, demo station headers, screen loops. Aligned with finalized web/PR messaging.

items.name: 3 × Navigate booth demos finalized
items.notes: Likely: Call Recording Intelligence, AI Agent Endpoint, User Insights. May also include Emergency Calling Demo.

items.name: LinkedIn Post Strategy - ICF GW / Thread launch
items.notes: Cadence, copy and post formats for launch.

items.name: ICF GW, Orch, APIs sales overview PPT
items.notes: Customer-facing sales deck. Messaging from Messaging House.

items.name: Sales enablement internal webinar - ICF GW + Thread
items.notes: Internal-only webinar covering positioning for the sales team ahead of Navigate.

items.name: Analyst deck - full ICF GW + Thread briefing
items.notes: Full category and product narrative, use cases, competitive framing. Used for all briefings. Will include charging models.

items.name: Embargoed Analyst briefings - Dean, Cavell, Metrigy, Omdia
items.notes: Plus smaller influencers. May be embargoed. Uses analyst briefing deck.

items.name: All-hands briefing - ICF GW + Thread
items.notes: ELT-led. Ensures everyone is aligned on messaging before Sep 9.

items.name: Build-out Phase 3 plan
items.notes: Includes media buys (e.g. Light Reading).

items.name: ICF GW, Orch, APIs product brochure
items.notes: Gated downloadable covering full platform and all sub-products.

items.name: Operator + end-user marketplace portal brochure
items.notes: How operators onboard. How users select Endpoints, etc.

items.name: Use case downloadable 1 - PCI (Fin’s Financial)
items.notes: Use case one-pager based on AI Strategy ELT deck scenarios. Gated.

items.name: Use case downloadable 2 - AIHC (Luigi’s Pizza)
items.notes: Use case one-pager for the AIHC scenario.

items.name: Use case downloadable 3 - AIAC (Terry’s Travel)
items.notes: Use case one-pager for the AIAC scenario.

items.name: ICF GW + marketplace sizzle video
items.notes: Short-form sizzle for CSP executives. For Navigate keynote, booth and website.

items.name: Thread Network solutions brief (downloadable)
items.notes: Gated downloadable: what it is, who it’s for, how to join. Developer value prop from ELT deck.

items.name: Thread Network sizzle video
items.notes: Short-form sizzle for AI developers. Hook: integrate once, reach 100+ CSPs.

items.name: Launch blog - ‘Woven for What’s Next’
items.notes: Article 1 in launch blog series. CEO vision piece on combined ICF GW + Thread story.

items.name: Citadel brochure
items.notes: Brochure promoting sovereign orch-layer offering for operators deploying their own AI.

items.name: Alianza Hub Employee Email - ICF GW + Thread
items.notes: September Alianza Hub employee newsletter section. Timed to Navigate launch week.

items.name: Thread PPT for potential devs (post-launch / GA)
items.notes: Developer pitch deck for recruiting EP and developer partners. Built on EP_ICF_Design_Partnership slide.

items.name: ICF GW + Thread press release (finalized)
items.notes: Build on Thread Network PR draft. Add customer quotes (Lumen, Swisscom?). Full legal review by Sep 2. Embargoed for Sep 9.

items.name: Embargoed Press Briefings
items.notes: Media briefed (Fierce Network, Light Reading) under embargo ahead of Sep 9. Will include charging models.

items.name: Tee-up ICF GW + Thread launch EDM
items.notes: Email blast to full contact list pointing to landing page, solutions brief, sizzle video. Timed to Sep 9.

items.name: Onboarding workflow for Thread Network developers
items.notes: Probably a HubSpot form on the microsite.

items.name: Developer portal - API docs
items.notes: Built on Kong.

items.name: Developer Sandbox (may not be required)
items.notes: Something for devs to test against.

items.name: ICF Marketplace + Citadel landing - Orchestration Layer
items.notes: Parent landing page for all ICF GW sub-pages. Staging deploys Sep 2. Pushing live Sep 9.

items.name: ICF Gateway sub-page
items.notes: What it is, how it works, who it’s for.

items.name: ICF Orchestrator sub-page
items.notes: AI routing and workflow orchestration capabilities.

items.name: ICF APIs sub-page
items.notes: Developer-facing. Links to the developer portal.

items.name: ICF Connector sub-page (TBD)
items.notes: Pre-built integrations connecting ICF GW to CSP infra. Module for CFS and MVS - not sure we promote separately.

items.name: Operator + end-user marketplace portal page
items.notes: How operators onboard. How users select Endpoints, etc.

items.name: Citadel sub-page
items.notes: Sovereign orch-layer offering for operators deploying their own AI.

items.name: Thread Network microsite - Landing
items.notes: Includes links to 2 sub-pages plus links to Alianza ‘about us’.

items.name: Thread Network microsite - About ICF
items.notes: Microsite page.

items.name: Thread Network microsite - Get Started (onboarding)
items.notes: Onboarding info and embedded HubSpot form.

items.name: Thread Network microsite - API / Docs access
items.notes: Might be a link on the menu or landing page. Will note that onboarding is required.

items.name: ICF Orchestration promo web banner
items.notes: Using defined artwork.

items.name: Thread Network promo web banner
items.notes: Using defined artwork.

items.name: Push the button on all Thunderclap content
items.notes: All pre-staged content goes live at the Navigate 26 keynote on Sep 9: press releases, web pages, launch blog, social posts, EDMs, video. Press / analyst release from embargo.

items.name: Launch blog #2 - ‘Woven for What’s Next’
items.notes: Article 2. Use case deep dive - how AI-handled, AI-assisted and post-call intelligence operate on ICF GW. Cite Thread examples.

items.name: Post-launch drumbeat EDM
items.notes: Follow-on EDM to full contact list two weeks after Navigate launch. Reinforces story, highlights post-launch content, nurtures leads.

items.name: ICF GW + Thread launch metrics roll-up
items.notes: First measurement roll-up. KPIs across web traffic, PR coverage, analyst sentiment, content engagement. Informs course corrections.

items.name: vCon Fall Atlanta speaker / sponsor
items.notes: FALL ’26 Voice and Conversations on the Net sponsor. Dag keynote.

items.name: Planning of external campaign (Light Reading)
items.notes: Start planning new campaign with Light Reading, promoting ICF GW + Thread. Commence mid October.

items.name: Phase 4 planning
items.notes: Build out Phase 4 plan - likely to fall into 2027.
